ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Somma delle opere che in tutte le scienze
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: et arti piu` nobili, et in varie lingue ha da mandare in luce l`Academia Venetiana, Parte nuove et non piu` stampate, parte con fedelissime tradottioni giudiciose correttioni, et utilissime annotationi riformate
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Dedicated to the Doge (at the time Lorenzo Priuli) and to the Venetian nobility. Full text available online at the John Rylands Library, Manchester, in the LUNA Database: http://enriqueta.man.ac.uk/luna/servlet/detail/Manchester~91~1~90319~104971
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
